title: LabySK
description: Skript Addon to use the LabyMod Server API with Simple Skript syntax!
body: # LabySK LabySk is a SkriptAddon which allows you to use the LabyMod Server API with simple Skript Syntax. # Info To use this plugin you need the following dependencies: - Skript - Citizens (Optional but needed if you want to use npc features) ## Important Note This plugin was developed for the version 1.20.4 and was tested with Paper and LabyMod Version 4.2 # Features On SkriptHub you can find the syntax for every feature in this addon: [![SkriptHubViewTheDocs](http://skripthub.net/static/addon/ViewTheDocsButton.png)](http://skripthub.net/docs/?addon=LabySK) [You can also see how some of the features will look ingame when you click on this message](https://github.com/pqtriick/LabySK/blob/master/preview.md) # Bugs If you find any bugs you can create an issue in the issues tab in the GitHub repository. I will try my best and fix it asap.
